Description: The main entry point for sending application data or requests to the the |embedded-bootloader|.
Implement the high-level communication interface via CAN.
Implement the basic CAN communication functions, including sending and receiving specified messages.
Responsible for managing the application binary file and providing functions to perform operations on it, e.g., calculating CRC, extracting data.
Contains all CAN messages as Enums and functions to get specified CAN messages.
